description: At Cal's abandoned office, Skye and Cal have an emotional conversation where Skye discovers her birth name: Daisy Johnson. Lincoln arrives, sent by Jiaying to look out for Skye, and Cal interprets this as a betrayal. Their confrontation is interrupted as Bakshi and HYDRA agents descend, believing S.H.I.E.L.D. is attacking, but Skye realizes HYDRA is behind the raid. Lincoln and Cal prepare to take on the attackers, while Skye tries to convince Cal to let her go.

transcript.line: Please, uh, excuse the mess... and the, uh, the roaches.
Johnson, is that your last name?
Was. Pretty ordinary, huh? I changed it to something more sinister when I went on the run.
Daisy Johnson. Huh.
I, um, I had one of these.
Coincidence? I think not. Genetics. Keep it if you like.
How is all this stuff still here?
I own the building.
You own the building?

Mm-hmm, every wall, every bulb, every cockroach. I wasn't rich, but you would have grown up quite comfortable. Had to shutter everything down after, uh, well, you know. Only been back a few times over the years.
So, this is like your stash pad, where you keep all of your old stuff?

Oh, I like that, “stash pad.” Makes it sound better than a crappy office. Okay. My grandfather's field kit from WWII. I used this to put your mother back together again. The truth is, her gift was the real healer. She's a walking miracle, your mother. The way she suffered and endured and fought through it.
You still love her.
How could I not? I mean, I know she resented me for a time after we lost you, but I think now that we're back together, that we can...
Please, stop.
What? What? What'd I say?

We're not all back together. You can't hang on to the past like this. You need to move on. We all do. Jiaying, she's responsible for all those people, and I... I-I'm an adult now. And as much as you want to turn back the clock to the time of science fairs and father-daughter dances...
They're gone, yeah. I know. I know.
Look, it doesn't mean that we can't see each other. I could visit.
Visit? Where are you going?
Who's there? Come out where I can see you.
Relax. It's just me.
Lincoln. What are you doing here?
Jiaying sent me to make sure everything was cool.
Why wouldn't everything be cool? What's going on here? Wait a minute. Y-You think Daisy isn't safe with me?
I didn't say that. Just calm down.
Don't patronize me. Who the hell do you think you are? I'm her father!
Fan out. If the teleporter is here, we want him alive.
Cal, let me explain.
What an idiot I've been, huh? I see what's happening. You were gonna dump me here like yesterday's trash. You don't want to spend time with me. This isn't daddy's day out. This is goodbye.
It's not forever, it...
Skye, don't.
Her name is Daisy!
Cal!
Well, what are you waiting for?
After everything I did for Jiaying, for our family. Years of searching, the pain, and the rejection!
Cal, I'm warning you.
Oh, you're warning me?
Watch out!
What's S.H.I.E.L.D. doing here?
It's not S.H.I.E.L.D., it's HYDRA.
Get her out of here. I'll take care of this. Hey, hey, fellas, huh?
I can handle myself.
No, don't use your powers. You could bring the whole building down. I'll help hold them off.
Let's not lose our heads, okay?
Just go, please.
